title: Aram MTR Craft
description: This is a remixed version of MTR Craft. Version 0.3.
body:
# IMPORTANT!!!
This ModPack contains CurseForge and Modrinth mods.

Therefore, it is not compatible with GDlauncher, CurseForgeApp, etc.

# Overview
This ModPack is designed to make playing Minecraft Transit railway fun and easy. It has most of the mods you need.

This is a remixed version of [MTR Craft.](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mtr-craft).

Here are some of them in detail.

- **Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR)** - This is the base of this modpack.
Without it, it would not be possible. Adds main automated trains, boats, ropeways, and planes.

- **The Tube (The London Underground)** - Add-on for Minecraft Transit railway.

- **Joban Client Mod** - Add items and blocks like those found in Hong Kong MTR stations.

- **Station Decorations** - Adds many useful items to the station.

- **Nemo's Transit Expansion** - This mod makes the rails look realistic.

- **Sodium(Fabric)** - Optimize FPS

- **Iris sharpers(Fabric)** Opifine shaders

- **WorldEdit(All) and worldEditCUI(Fabric)** - This helps in bulk editing and deleting. Here is the [wiki](https://worldedit.enginehub.org/en/latest/usage/tools/tools/) for WorldEdit. 

- **Just Enough Items** -  item and recipe viewing mod for Minecraft - built from the ground up for stability and performance

- **Journey Map** - Real-time mapping in-game or in web browser as you explore

- **Explorer's Compass** - locate structures anywhere in the world

- **Nature's Compass** - search for a biome's location anywhere in the world

- **ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village** - adds new and improved villages and pillager outposts to Minecraft

- **Dynamic Lights** - emit light from light blocks before being put down

- **Essential Mod** - quality of life mod that boosts Minecraft Java to the next level

- **Macaw** - aesthetically pleasing and functional building elements to Minecraft
